creator: weh@microsoft.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Baptist from comment #10)
This is from an on-prem Windows Server 2019 Build 10.0.17763. I created a Gen2 VM from a 12.3 iso, and then built and booted a kernel from 13 stable branch. So, it should have all the commits you mentioned for EFI memmap. 

I didn't try in Azure as there is no FreeBSD Gen2 image in Azure Marketplace.

Do you have a list of those commits? I was not aware of such changes. It would be interesting to know if this makes FreeBSD behave differently on different h/w and VM size. 

You can also try your image on VMs with fewer cpus, like E8 or E4.
